<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

## How do I progress a record (model) along in its lifecycle within {{< var vm.product >}}?

Transition a record along in the workflow, for example for review with the next set of stakeholders, by changing a record's status.

{{< include /guide/workflows/_transition-workflow-examples.qmd >}}
